TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Matt Aitch sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 9, Matt Aitch, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) pinqbaqan nya Matt Aitch, t'aring kawas tay 1963 tehuk kawas tay 1965, mqwas biru sa Moberly Area CC pqwsan biru krahu. t'aring kawas tay 1965 tehuk kawas tay 1967, mqwas biru sa Michigan State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: matt aitʦ~ʨħ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, matt aitʦ~ʨħ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) pinqβaqan nja matt aitʦ~ʨħ, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa moβerlj area ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨ pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa miʦ~ʨħiɣan s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Matt Aitch sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 9, Matt Aitch, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) pinqbaqan nya Matt Aitch, t'aring kawas tay 1963 tehuk kawas tay 1965, mqwas biru sa Moberly Area CC pqwsan biru krahu. t'aring kawas tay 1965 tehuk kawas tay 1967, mqwas biru sa Michigan State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

(mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) pinqβaqan nja matt aitʦ~ʨħ, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa moβerlj area ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨ pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa miʦ~ʨħiɣan s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
